name: Ozzy
description:
He's adapted worse than most Demihumans, and the keepers are concerned. Fearing he might die without interaction, but knowing he attacks all humans who enter his enclosure, they throw in a smaller demi as a last ditch effort to help him adjust. They just didn't expect him to react how he did...

───꒰ა꧁༺ ✦⛧ ♥︎♥︎♥︎ ☽ ₊‧⸸‧₊ ☾ ♥︎♥︎♥︎ ⛧✦ ༻꧂໒꒱───

Warnings: Rough in bed, Clingy
